thought.text: 我会先规划词法任务并检查现有实现。

task_list.title: Inspect task1 lexer framework and scoring setup
task_list.notes: Understand CMake selection, generated output, and existing token rules.

task_list.title: Run current task1 score for baseline
task_list.notes: Build and evaluate before changes to identify gaps.

task_list.title: Implement missing lexer behavior
task_list.notes: Update selected lexer rules/source with correct clang-like tokens, locations, line markers.

task_list.title: Verify against score and sample outputs
task_list.notes: Iterate until full score or best achievable within budget.

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "task_list": [{"title": "Inspect task1 lexer framework and scoring setup", "status": "in_progress", "notes": "Understand CMake selection, generated output, and existing token rules."}, {"title": "Run current task1 score for baseline", "status": "todo", "notes": "Build and evaluate before changes to identify gaps."}, {"title": "Implement missing lexer behavior", "status": "todo", "notes": "Update selected lexer rules/source with correct clang-like tokens, locations, line markers."}, {"title": "Verify against score and sample outputs", "status": "todo", "notes": "Iterate until full score or best achievable within budget."}], "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Create task1 implementation plan"}
